title: Tala Capstan Style Acrylic Salt & Pepper Mill Set,Fully Adjustable Ceramic Grinder for Course and Fine Grinding,Refillable and reuseable with Transparent Design, Each Mill Measures 10cm Tall
features: STYLISH ACRYLIC DESIGN: The 100mm Tala Capstan Acrylic Pepper Mill features a sleek, modern design that adds a touch of elegance to any kitchen or dining table
CERAMIC GRINDER: Equipped with a durable ceramic grinding mechanism, this pepper mill ensures long-lasting, rust-free performance and precise grinding

FULLY ADJUSTABLE GRIND SETTINGS: Customise your grind from fine to coarse for perfect seasoning, giving you complete control over your dispensing, This mill can be used for either Salt or Pepper Grinding

VERSATILE DESIGN: Perfect for home or for professional use, This Mill is ideal for Kitchen and table use and perfect for Restaurants and Cafes, the Tala Seasoning mill combines style and practicality for any setting
DURABLE: Made with premium materials, the Tala 100mm Capstan Acrylic Pepper Mill is built to withstand daily use and provide reliable performance for years
TALA: Beloved Kitchenware Brand since 1899, with over 120 years of Baking Hertitage
description: Enhance your dining experience with the Tala Acrcylic Salt and Pepper Mills Made from sustainably sourced wood, this stylish mill features a premium quality ceramic grinder for consistent, rust-free performance. Perfect for both home kitchens and for Home, Restaurants, Cafes, and Hotels use, it offers durability, reliability, and a touch of elegance for any settingTala is one of the oldest best loved Kitchenware Brands. A trusted supplier of Baking and Caking Decorating supplies since 1899, Tala has grown to supply cooks and bakers all over the world. Today Tala Manufactures products in nunmerous sites across the UK including Liverpool, Accroington, Norfolk and Burnley. Traditional methods are still used to manufacture most Tala Products
